chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl. Appeal No.S-120 of 2019. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.1510/2023. 2. For orders on M.A No.1511/2023. 3. For orders on M.A.No.1512/2023. 31.03.2023 Mr. Abid Hussain Qadri, advocate for the appellant. Mr. Ali Anwar Kandhro, Addl. P. G. -.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency granted. 2&3. The applicant by way of listed application has sought for return of Saving Certificate worth rupees Five Lacs which were furnished before this Court by her late husband Balram for release of accused Khemraj. The applicant may in first instance obtain Succession Certificate and then apply for return of the said amount. The listed applications are disposed of accordingly. JUDGE
